title: Sentinel
description:
Turning Minecraft into a roguelike adding loot drops to the warden, powerful new tools and overwhelming promises

4:10 blue
body:
![Sentinel Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ac6c17c181401501828eb6a4cd6c7604f84cadc.png)
## Sentinel is a mod planning to add Roguelike mechanics to the game!
This mod is still under development, so I would really appreciate it if you could tell me about any glitches you find!
At the moment, Sentinel, while playable and fun, is still in its beta and is planned to be updated frequently until perfected. The main goal of Sentinel, however, is to add various fun and engaging dungeons, weapons, blocks, enchants, and potion effects! At the moment, there is only one category, but we are planning to have three!
### WARDEN
Obtain versatile and powerful tools by defeating the Warden you can upgrade netherite swords and axes.
- Sculk claymore
- Sculk long-sword
- Sculking potion effect
